panels.title: Statistical Anomalies (2+ Std Dev from 30d Average)

targets.queryText: SELECT 'Market Value' AS "Metric", ROUND(current_val, 0) AS "Current", ROUND(avg_30d, 0) AS "30d Avg", ROUND(stddev_30d, 0) AS "Std Dev", ROUND((current_val - avg_30d) / NULLIF(stddev_30d, 0), 2) AS "Z-Score" FROM (SELECT (SELECT market_value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1) AS current_val, AVG(market_value) AS avg_30d, (SELECT SQRT(AVG((market_value - sub.avg_val) * (market_value - sub.avg_val))) FROM daily_portfolio, (SELECT AVG(market_value) AS avg_val FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-30 day')) AS sub WHERE daily_portfolio.as_of_date_local >= date('now','-30 day')) AS stddev_30d FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-30 day')) WHERE ABS((current_val - avg_30d) / NULLIF(stddev_30d, 0)) > 2 UNION ALL SELECT 'LTV %', ROUND(current_val * 100, 1), ROUND(avg_30d * 100, 1), ROUND(stddev_30d * 100, 1), ROUND((current_val - avg_30d) / NULLIF(stddev_30d, 0), 2) FROM (SELECT (SELECT ltv_pct / 100 FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1) AS current_val, AVG(ltv_pct / 100) AS avg_30d, (SELECT SQRT(AVG((ltv_pct / 100 - sub.avg_val) * (ltv_pct / 100 - sub.avg_val))) FROM daily_portfolio, (SELECT AVG(ltv_pct / 100) AS avg_val FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-30 day')) AS sub WHERE daily_portfolio.as_of_date_local >= date('now','-30 day')) AS stddev_30d FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-30 day')) WHERE ABS((current_val - avg_30d) / NULLIF(stddev_30d, 0)) > 2 UNION ALL SELECT 'TWR 1M %', ROUND(current_val * 100, 2), ROUND(avg_30d * 100, 2), ROUND(stddev_30d * 100, 2), ROUND((current_val - avg_30d) / NULLIF(stddev_30d, 0), 2) FROM (SELECT (SELECT twr_1m_pct / 100 FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1) AS current_val, AVG(twr_1m_pct / 100) AS avg_30d, (SELECT SQRT(AVG((twr_1m_pct / 100 - sub.avg_val) * (twr_1m_pct / 100 - sub.avg_val))) FROM daily_portfolio, (SELECT AVG(twr_1m_pct / 100) AS avg_val FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-30 day') AND twr_1m_pct IS NOT NULL) AS sub WHERE daily_portfolio.as_of_date_local >= date('now','-30 day') AND twr_1m_pct IS NOT NULL) AS stddev_30d FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-30 day') AND twr_1m_pct IS NOT NULL) WHERE ABS((current_val - avg_30d) / NULLIF(stddev_30d, 0)) > 2;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM (SELECT 'Market Value' AS "Metric", ROUND(current_val, 0) AS "Current", ROUND(avg_30d, 0) AS "30d Avg", ROUND(stddev_30d, 0) AS "Std Dev", ROUND((current_val - avg_30d) / NULLIF(stddev_30d, 0), 2) AS "Z-Score" FROM (SELECT (SELECT market_value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1) AS current_val, AVG(market_value) AS avg_30d, (SELECT SQRT(AVG((market_value - sub.avg_val) * (market_value - sub.avg_val))) FROM daily_portfolio, (SELECT AVG(market_value) AS avg_val FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-30 day')) AS sub WHERE daily_portfolio.as_of_date_local >= date('now','-30 day')) AS stddev_30d FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-30 day')) WHERE ABS((current_val - avg_30d) / NULLIF(stddev_30d, 0)) > 2);
SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, market_value AS "MV" FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-30 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local;
